text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Summer camp's here! ☆ Let's do our best, Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon will be joining Copano Rickey for
training at this year's summer camp. She'll be a
reassuring partner to have around.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's do lots and lots of training together! Enough
that Tarumae takes notice!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully, when she sees us, she'll want to stand
on the stage again. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey agrees, but she doesn't look too
optimistic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assume she's sensing from the feng shui that it
won't be that easy. But still...
choice_data_list: Rickey. All you can do on your end is improve.
Rickey. All you can do on your end is improve.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
choice_data_list: It's your turn to inspire Tarumae.
It's your turn to inspire Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Inspire... Yeah, you're right. Until now...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
She's always been the one to inspire me. She's
been like a living goal, sprinting off way ahead of
me. But now...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That guiding wind has stopped blowing. Which
means, this time...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to be the one to push ahead! To the place
where the qi flows best!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And I've gotta do it with enough power to break
open a path for those behind me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'll need your help, Falco! With all
your experience as an Umadol...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I just know that if I run with you, I'll gain a deeper
understanding of running, and of how Tarumae
feels!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪ I'll do everything I can to help. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Smart Falcon's guidance, Copano Rickey
could go from being a rising star on the dirt to a
superstar of the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One thing's for sure: this summer, she'll be kicking
things into high gear.
